title: Cat Radiator Bed - Super Soft Faux Fur Cat Hammock for Indoor Cats - Radiator Kitten Beds with Strong Metal Frame, Washable Cover - Warm Bed for Kittens & Large Cats
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 𝗪𝗮𝗿𝗺 & 𝗖𝗼?𝘆 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁: Keep your furry friend snug with this 44x26x38 cm super soft faux fur radiator cat bed; designed to provide the perfect warm spot during chilly days, protecting your pet from cold floors and draughts while ensuring total comfort.

𝗦𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗱𝘆 & 𝗗𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻: Made with a strong metal frame and 400 GSM polyester fabric, this cat radiator hammock provides excellent support and long-lasting use; ideal for both small kittens and larger cats weighing up to 5kg.
𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝗧𝗼 𝗦𝗲𝘁 𝗨𝗽 & 𝗦𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗲: No tools required; the bed easily hooks over most standard radiators and folds flat for quick storage when not in use; a practical and space-saving cat accessory for any home.

𝗪𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 & 𝗟𝗼𝗪 𝗠𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲: Features a removable, machine-washable faux fur cover that keeps your cat’s resting area clean and hygienic; hand wash or gentle machine cycle recommended for lasting softness.
𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗚𝗿𝗲𝘆 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻: The sleek grey faux fur finish complements modern interiors while offering a luxurious feel; perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, or anywhere your cat loves to relax.
